title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CCAvenue - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CCAvenue - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at CCAvenue are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About CCAvenue:
CCAvenue is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CCAvenue!
